Node.help: The base class for test configurations

PropertyNode.name: statManager
PropertyNode.help: StatManager registers for statistics and reports the to StatViewer

PropertyString.name: userName
PropertyString.help: The user name used when creating this Test

Method2.name: Ping
Method2.help: Empty method used to test basic connectivity

Method2.name: Save
Method2.help: Save this test configuration along with application data

Argument.name: appXml
Argument.help: The application data to save with the test

Method2.name: SaveAs
Method2.help: Save this test configuration under a different name

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name to save this test under

Argument.name: appXml
Argument.help: The application data to save with the test

Argument.name: id
Argument.help: The id the test was saved under

Method2.name: Close
Method2.help: Close this test and release all resources associated with it

Method2.name: GetAppXml
Method2.help: Get the application data associated with a particular test

Argument.name: id
Argument.help: The id of the test to retrieve the associated data for

Method2.name: GetReporterXmd
Method2.help: Get the reporter xmd xml associated with a particular test result

Method2.name: SetReporterXmd
Method2.help: Set the reporter xmd xml associated with a particular test result
